key.name: open-duration
key.description: Duration in milliseconds of the window-open animation.

key.name: open-start-scale
key.description: The scale a window starts at before growing to full size when opening.

key.name: enable-overshoot
key.description: Whether the open animation slightly overshoots past full size before settling back.

key.name: close-duration
key.description: Duration in milliseconds of the window-close animation.

key.name: close-end-scale
key.description: The scale a window shrinks to before disappearing when closing.
